get.description: Returns the lean mobile bootstrap contract for the authenticated user. This route is intended for identity, owner context, broad feature visibility, and platform or team membership metadata. It is not the full billing summary contract.

get.description: Returns the canonical mobile pipeline contract for request, quote, job, task, and invoice timeline flows. This is the JSON route mobile should call. The web-only `/pipeline/timeline/{entityType}/{entityId}` route remains an Inertia wrapper and is not the canonical API entry point.

put.description: Updates payment method, tip, and loyalty settings used by the current tenant.

plan_key: Please choose a valid subscription plan.

example.prompt: Generate a polished storefront hero image with plants and warm daylight.

409.description: Owners must complete onboarding before loading internal AI image generation.

example.message: Limite atteinte. Reessayez dans quelques minutes.

example.message: Limite quotidienne d'images IA atteinte. Achetez un pack IA pour continuer.

500.description: Image generation failed after credit consumption and the consumed credit was refunded.

post.description: Generates a store or product image through the same backend AI workflow used by the web app. The contract preserves free daily usage, owner-level assistant credit consumption, refund on failure, storage, and returned public image URL.
